case_title: GARRISON, DAVID - CONTRACTOR VS APPENROD, JIM ( AGENT) C/O LAUREL REALTY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,593.54 FILED BY GARRISON, DAVID  - CONTRACTOR AS TO DEFENDANT APPENROD, JIM ( AGENT) C/O LAUREL REALTY STOLTZ, BERNARD ( OWNER) C/O DALY CITY TIRE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
INVALID POS, NO DESCRITPION OF SERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARRISON, DAVID  - CONTRACTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT APPENROD, JIM ( AGENT) C/O LAUREL REALTY STOLTZ, BERNARD ( OWNER) C/O DALY CITY TIRE CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
